sentences.arabic: صَنَعَ بَعْضُ الْمُبْدِعِينَ مُحْتَوًى تَعْلِيمِيًّا مُفِيدًا لِلْمُتَابِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Neki kreativci su napravili korisne obrazovne sadržaje za pratioce.
sentences.translationEn: Some creators have made useful educational content for followers.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ الطُّلَّابُ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ لِتَعَلُّمِ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Studenti prate ove influensere kako bi naučili nove vještine.
sentences.translationEn: Students follow these influencers to learn new skills.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النَّوْعُ مِنَ التَّوَاصُلِ يَبْنِي مُجْتَمَعَاتٍ رَقْمِيَّةً قَوِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta komunikacije gradi snažne digitalne zajednice.
sentences.translationEn: This type of communication builds strong digital communities.
